case_title: MERAZ, GILBERT T. VS JOW, JAMES

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,000.00 FILED BY MERAZ, GILBERT T. AS TO DEFENDANT JOW, JAMES ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-17-1994 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 08
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT JOW, JAMES

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MERAZ, GILBERT T. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JOW, JAMES $3,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $15.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,015.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
